title: Delhi court grants Sharjeel Imam interim bail for 10 days to attend brother's wedding
description: A Delhi court on Monday granted interim bail for 10 days to Delhi riots accused and Jawaharlal Nehru University scholar Sharjeel Imam to attend his brother's wedding and to take care of his ailing mother.Additional Sessions Judge Sameer Bajpai of Karkardooma courts granted bail to Imam from March 20 to March 30.The Court added while on bail, Imam must not contact media or use social media. He has also been directed to interact only with family members, friends and relatives."Considering the fact
